2025-26 Nevada Wolf Pack Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 24-13 (12-8, 5th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Steve Alford

PS/G: 76.0 (170th of 365)

PA/G: 71.5 (112th of 365)

SRS: 10.34 (71st of 365)

SOS: 5.85 (86th of 365)

ORtg: 112.4 (117th of 365)

DRtg: 105.7 (148th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
